proposed_aliases.reason: Same global project: both records identify Grand Central Madison/East Side Access. The alias is a January 2023 source-time status slice for the same station/terminal expansion already represented by the target.

Same global project: both records use the exact project name Grand Central Madison. The alias frames LIRR service-expansion timing, while the target is the consolidated Grand Central Madison project record.
Same global project: the alias and target are both Grand Central Madison. The alias's pre-inaugural shuttle-service status is a document-time lifecycle note, not a distinct project scope.
Same global project: both records identify Grand Central Madison. The alias gives opening/full-service timing for the same new terminal represented by the target.

alias.status: opened January 25, 2023; full service beginning February 27, 2023

proposed_aliases.reason: Same global project: the alias is a source-specific Grand Central Madison/GCM project record. Its pre-launch status is document-time context for the same station/infrastructure project.
Same global project: both records describe LIRR/MNR Positive Train Control implementation. The alias names implementation directly; the target is the consolidated LIRR/MNR PTC project/update record.
Same global project: both records identify the LIRR/MNR PTC Project with implementation/close-out scope. Source differences are repeated meeting-document mentions, not separate project identities.

Same global project: the alias is an implementation-update record for the LIRR/MNR PTC project. Ongoing/active status is source-time update framing for the same PTC implementation and close-out project.

record_existence_and_kind.command: sqlite3 -readonly -header -csv data/canonical.db "with ids(id) as (values ('project_grand-central-madison-jan2023'),('project_grand-central-madison-lirr'),('project_grand-central-madison-meeting-doc-104741'),('project_grand-central-madison-meeting-doc-105771'),('project_meeting-doc-grand-central-madison'),('project_lirr-mnr-ptc-implementation'),('project_meeting-doc-lirr-mnr-ptc'),('project_meeting-doc-lirr-mnr-ptc-update'),('project_grand-central-madison'),('project_lirr-mnr-ptc')) select count(*) as ids_checked, sum(case when r.record_kind='project' then 1 else 0 end) as project_kind_count, coalesce(group_concat(case when r.record_kind is null or r.record_kind!='project' then ids.id end, '|'),'') as missing_or_non_project from ids left join records r on r.record_id=ids.id;"

commands.command: jq -r --argjson aliases '["project_grand-central-madison-jan2023","project_grand-central-madison-lirr","project_grand-central-madison-meeting-doc-104741","project_grand-central-madison-meeting-doc-105771","project_meeting-doc-grand-central-madison","project_lirr-mnr-ptc-implementation","project_meeting-doc-lirr-mnr-ptc","project_meeting-doc-lirr-mnr-ptc-update"]' '[.aliases.project as $p | $aliases[] | select($p[.] != null)] | length' data/identity-overrides/merges.json

sqlite3 -readonly -header -csv data/canonical.db "with ids(alias,target) as (values ('project_grand-central-madison-jan2023','project_grand-central-madison'),('project_grand-central-madison-lirr','project_grand-central-madison'),('project_grand-central-madison-meeting-doc-104741','project_grand-central-madison'),('project_grand-central-madison-meeting-doc-105771','project_grand-central-madison'),('project_meeting-doc-grand-central-madison','project_grand-central-madison'),('project_lirr-mnr-ptc-implementation','project_lirr-mnr-ptc'),('project_meeting-doc-lirr-mnr-ptc','project_lirr-mnr-ptc'),('project_meeting-doc-lirr-mnr-ptc-update','project_lirr-mnr-ptc')) select count(*) as identity_alias_conflicts from ids join identity_aliases ia on ia.kind='project' and ia.alias=ids.alias;"

sqlite3 -readonly -header -csv data/canonical.db "with ids(alias,target) as (values ('project_grand-central-madison-jan2023','project_grand-central-madison'),('project_grand-central-madison-lirr','project_grand-central-madison'),('project_grand-central-madison-meeting-doc-104741','project_grand-central-madison'),('project_grand-central-madison-meeting-doc-105771','project_grand-central-madison'),('project_meeting-doc-grand-central-madison','project_grand-central-madison'),('project_lirr-mnr-ptc-implementation','project_lirr-mnr-ptc'),('project_meeting-doc-lirr-mnr-ptc','project_lirr-mnr-ptc'),('project_meeting-doc-lirr-mnr-ptc-update','project_lirr-mnr-ptc')) select count(*) as db_do_not_merge_pair_conflicts from ids join do_not_merge d on d.kind='project' and ((d.record_id_a=ids.alias and d.record_id_b=ids.target) or (d.record_id_a=ids.target and d.record_id_b=ids.alias));"

jq -r --argjson aliases '["project_grand-central-madison-jan2023","project_grand-central-madison-lirr","project_grand-central-madison-meeting-doc-104741","project_grand-central-madison-meeting-doc-105771","project_meeting-doc-grand-central-madison","project_lirr-mnr-ptc-implementation","project_meeting-doc-lirr-mnr-ptc","project_meeting-doc-lirr-mnr-ptc-update"]' '[.pairs.project[]? | .record_ids[] as $id | select($aliases | index($id))] | length' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

candidate_source_and_validator_evidence.command: sqlite3 -readonly -header -csv data/canonical.db "with ids(record_id) as (values ('project_grand-central-madison-jan2023'),('project_grand-central-madison-lirr'),('project_grand-central-madison-meeting-doc-104741'),('project_grand-central-madison-meeting-doc-105771'),('project_meeting-doc-grand-central-madison'),('project_grand-central-madison'),('project_lirr-mnr-ptc-implementation'),('project_meeting-doc-lirr-mnr-ptc'),('project_meeting-doc-lirr-mnr-ptc-update'),('project_lirr-mnr-ptc')) select r.record_id,r.display_name,json_extract(r.payload,'$.project_name') as project_name,json_extract(r.payload,'$.project_type') as project_type,json_extract(r.payload,'$.status') as status,json_extract(r.payload,'$.document_time_status') as doc_status,r.primary_source_id,group_concat(e.source_id||'#'||e.block_id,'; ') as evidence_refs from records r join ids using(record_id) left join evidence_refs e on e.record_id=r.record_id group by r.record_id order by r.record_id;"
candidate_source_and_validator_evidence.result: All selected aliases and targets are project records with matching project_name/shared record_alias evidence; concise refs are copied into proposed_aliases.

forbidden_command_compliance.evidence: Preparation used local deterministic inspection only: rg, jq, sqlite3 -readonly data/canonical.db, ls/sed/head/git status/date, and apply_patch to create this artifact. No external/provider-backed commands, profiles/providers, canonicalize, canonicalize-wave, canonicalize-review, campaign dedup, identity-review-run, write, ask, schema-propose, ontology-normalize-run, materialize, export-jsonl, or validate commands were run.
